summary: Localized the first low-risk presentation-owned display-name adapter batch for LifeDomain, Focus/previous-day statuses, TrainingStatus, WritingStage, WritingSourceType, and CareerRecordType while keeping domain enum raw values and persistence unchanged.
validations_passed: xcodebuild build -quiet -project owlory_xcode/Owlory.xcodeproj -scheme Owlory -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath /tmp/owlory-display-name-localization-build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO

contract_status_changes.before: Several feature surfaces displayed enum-backed labels through domain title helpers or rawValue.capitalized.
contract_status_changes.after: The first low-risk display labels now resolve through feature-local presentation adapters backed by Localizable.strings while domain enums, raw values, and persistence stay semantic.
proof: xcodebuild build -quiet -project owlory_xcode/Owlory.xcodeproj -scheme Owlory -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath /tmp/owlory-display-name-localization-build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO

contract_status_changes.before: Localization resources contained 229 static keys and 11 plural keys, with display-name adapters deferred.
contract_status_changes.after: All 19 locales contain 282 static keys and 11 plural keys, including display adapter keys for the first low-risk batch.

contract_status_changes.before: Domain enum title helpers still exist and some feature surfaces used them directly.
contract_status_changes.after: This slice did not change Core/Domain enum raw values, Codable shape, or persistence; changed surfaces now use feature-local localized adapters.

residual_risks: Non-English display adapter values remain English placeholders and require translation-quality review.
Core/Domain still contains legacy English title helpers for compatibility; this slice routed only the first low-risk presentation surfaces away from them.

Remaining localization buckets include readiness summaries, weekly digest insight/highlight summaries, recurrence interval labels, broader model-backed accessibility interpolation, and running-app locale smoke.
No running-app locale smoke, screenshot proof, device proof, or TestFlight proof was captured.
The unsigned simulator build passed with the pre-existing TodayView onChange deprecation warning and build-info run script notes unrelated to this slice.
git diff --check initially caught extra blank lines at EOF in locale files; the files were trimmed mechanically and the check passed.
recommended_next_reason: The localization implementation lane now has foundation, extraction, dynamic contract, Today plurals, digest formatting, protocol schedule projection, notification copy, and a first display-name adapter batch; the next proof gap is running-app locale smoke rather than more source extraction.
